purpose: Mandatory contract for temporary lifecycle checks so scaffolds, monitors, crutches, and one-time closure guards have explicit weakness signals and exit criteria.

field_contract.why_it_exists: why the temporary check exists now instead of permanent runtime self-enforcement
field_contract.runtime_weakness_signal: what persistent need for this check says about the subsystem that must become stronger
field_contract.target_runtime_owner: runtime subsystem responsible for absorbing the check before retirement
field_contract.expires_after: YYYY-MM-DD review deadline; expiry without success means strengthen runtime rather than silently extending
field_contract.migration_target: permanent validator, runtime invariant, or owning subsystem that should absorb the temporary check
field_contract.success_criteria: minimum empirical run window required before retirement backlog creation
